template.name: ServiceQueue
DoorMotorController
template.declaration: bool doorOpen = false; // prevents doorCloseChannel from firing before the door has actually opened clock doorTimer;

transition.label: !overloaded && allDoorsClosed() && !hasElevatorArrived(current_floor, target_floor) && travelTimer >= FLOOR_TRAVEL_TIME

current_floor += target_direction, floorDisplay[current_floor].display_floor = current_floor, floorDisplay[current_floor].direction = target_direction, elevatorDisplay.display_floor = current_floor, elevatorDisplay.direction = target_direction, travelTimer = 0
